_note: Conductor geometry configuration. Edit these values to adjust calculation behaviour without changing code. Mirror any changes in the Google Sheet / Excel config tab.
_cable_od_safety_note: Dimensional design margin for SECTOR conductors only — NOT used in any weight calculation. Reported as design_laidup_od_mm in BOM output. Formula: design_laidup_od = (2r + 2×t_ins) × factor. Circular conductors (compacted, round stranded) have no safety factor.
_sector_compaction_note: Sector conductor fill: effective area = geometric_area × 0.93. Divide by 0.93 when computing geometric area from DC-resistance-derived electrical area.
_compacted_circular_note: Fixed absolute margin added to IS 10462 fictitious diameter before applying the safety factor above.
_round_stranded_note: OD = factor × sqrt(area_mm2). Accounts for packing factor of non-compacted stranded conductors.
